criteria.label: Define TP, FP, TN, FN and sketch the 2×2 layout (rows=actual, cols=predicted).
criteria.example: Draw a table with TN/FP on the actual-0 row and FN/TP on the actual-1 row; label positive class = 1.

criteria.label: Compute TP, FP, TN, FN from small y_true and y_pred arrays by hand.
criteria.example: Given y_true=[1,0,1,0], y_pred=[1,0,0,1], write TP=1, FP=1, TN=1, FN=1 and verify sum=4.

criteria.label: Build a confusion matrix on held-out data with scikit-learn and unpack TN, FP, FN, TP.
criteria.example: Fit LogisticRegression; threshold predict_proba at 0.5; call confusion_matrix(y_test, y_pred); print cm.ravel().

criteria.label: Derive TPR, FPR, and precision from one matrix and interpret FP vs FN for a scenario.
criteria.example: From TP=40, FP=10, TN=900, FN=50, compute TPR=40/90, FPR=10/910, precision=40/50; state whether FN or FP is the bigger business risk.
